Weekly Events

Something loud, live, and worth showing up for.

From karaoke chaos to live bands that keep the room moving, Cory Frank's brings the energy every night of the week.

🎤

Karaoke

Sunday & Thursday

Bring your best anthem, your worst dance moves, and a crew that knows how to cheer loud.

🎯

Xtreme Bar Bingo

Tuesdays

Fast rounds, big laughs, cold drinks, and the kind of Tuesday that never feels like Tuesday.

🎸

Live Music Open Jam

Wednesdays at 7PM

A gritty, high-energy stage for local talent, regulars, and anyone who came to hear something real.

🎵

Live Bands

Every Friday & Saturday Night

The weekend starts here with packed rooms, stacked playlists, and serious stage presence.

About Us

Your neighborhood bar, amped up.

Cory Frank's Bar & Grill is where Kansas City comes to unwind, catch the game, and stay for the second round. Open since 2018, we pair signature cocktails, serious bar food, and a room built for good times.

Sports

10 Big-Screen TVs

Drinks

Signature Cocktails

Food

Great Grill Favorites

Since

2018

Menu Vibe

Bar food that hits hard. Drinks that keep the night moving.

Game Day Bites

Shareable starters, stacked burgers, wings, and all the salty, crispy fuel needed for the big game.

Signature Cocktails

Classic pours, bold mixed drinks, and crowd favorites made for a premium nightlife feel.

Late-Night Classics

After-hours cravings meet a kitchen that knows exactly how to keep the crowd fed and happy.

Find Us

5410 NE Antioch Rd, Kansas City, MO 64118

Pull up for the atmosphere, stay for the cocktails, and make Cory Frank's your go-to stop for game nights, birthdays, and weekend plans.

Band Inquiries

Bring the sound. We’ll bring the crowd.

If you’ve got a live set, open jam energy, or a recurring event idea, Cory Frank's is ready for the kind of nights people talk about on the ride home.
